title: II-VI (IIVI) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: II-VI (IIVI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.47% and 2.81%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Why II-VI Shares Are Trading Higher Today
text: II-VI Inc (NASDAQ: IIVI) reported third-quarter FY22 revenue growth of 5.7% year-on-year to $827.7 million, beating the consensus of $804.8 million. Segments: Photonic Solutions revenue increased 11.8% Y/Y to $567.8 million.
